home.subtitle: Report broken roads, garbage, water issues, and more in seconds. NepalSewa connects citizens directly to their municipalities.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to get your issue resolved.
home.step1Desc: Photograph the issue and submit a report with a description in seconds.
home.step2Desc: Pin the exact location on the map so authorities find it immediately.
home.step3Desc: The relevant municipality receives, triages, and dispatches a crew.
home.categoriesSubtitle: NepalSewa handles every kind of civic issue.
home.footerTagline: Connecting citizens to their municipalities for a better Nepal.
home.mockTitle: Large pothole causing accidents on Bagbazaar Road
home.mockDesc: A significant pothole near the temple intersection has been growing for weeks.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and notification preferences
profile.languageDesc: Choose the language NepalSewa uses for the interface and email notifications.
profile.emailNotifDesc: Receive email updates when your report is verified, in progress, resolved, or rejected.
profile.emailNotifOn: You will receive status update emails
profile.myReportsDesc: View and manage issues you've reported
profile.pushDesc: Get notified on this device, even when SmartNepal isn't open.
profile.pushEnabled: Push notifications enabled on this device
profile.pushDisabled: Push notifications disabled on this device

pwa.installDescIos: Safari on iOS does not support automatic installation. Follow these simple steps to add the app to your home screen:
pwa.installDescGeneric: Install the app on your device for fast access, offline issue reporting, and push updates.
pwa.iosStep1Post: button in the browser toolbar at the bottom (or top on iPad).
pwa.iosStep2Pre: Scroll down the share sheet menu and select
pwa.iosStep3Post: in the top-right corner to complete the installation.
pwa.toastNotAvailable: Installation prompt is not available. Please try installing from your browser menu.
pwa.toastError: Failed to trigger installation. Please try again.
